title: OmniFormatter Ruby / PHP / Perl / Lua Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for dynamic scripting languages.

ruby__frozenStringLiteral.description: [Ruby] Add # frozen_string_literal: true comment at the top of each file.

ruby__hashStyle.description: [Ruby] Key: value (ruby19 symbol shorthand) or :key => value (hash rocket).

php__braceStyle.description: [PHP] PSR-2/PSR-12 is the modern PHP standard (K&R-like).

php__shortArraySyntax.description: [PHP] Use [] for arrays instead of array().

perl__strictMode.description: [Perl] Require 'use strict;' and 'use warnings;' at the top of every script.

lua__localVariables.description: [Lua] Always declare variables with 'local' to avoid global namespace pollution.
